xllm.description: Autonomous development agent for xllm - Rust LLM inference engine (llama.cpp port). TDD-first, CPU-primary, nightly Rust.

test.description: Run tests, optionally filtered by name: cargo test [$ARGUMENTS]

lint.description: Run all linters in order: markdown fix, cargo fmt, cargo clippy
lint.template: mise run markdownlint:fix && cargo fmt && cargo clippy -- -D warnings
